LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF PD RESTORATION OF EAST BAY, INC.'S PETITION FOR AN ORDER STAYING PROCEEDINGS PENDING ARBITRATION. THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING IS NOT CONTESTED. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF PD RESTORATION OF EAST BAY, INC.'S PETITION FOR AN ORDER STAYING PROCEEDINGS PENDING ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Notice Of Petition Of Pd Restoration Of East Bay, Inc. For An Order Staying Proceedings Pending Arbitration; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support; Declaration Of Joshua N. Rosen In Support; [Proposed] Order Ccp Secs 1281.2; 1281.4; 1281.5; 1290.4; Cal. Rules Of Court, Rule 3.1330
Off Calendar Aug-29-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Atty. ANDREA R. MURPHY, ESQ. of Phillips, Spallas & Angstadt LLP (Te;: 415-278-9400) appearing via CourtCall for defendant;
No other appearances made in this matter.

PLAINTIFF PD RESTORATION OF EAST BAY, INC.'S PETITION FOR AN ORDER STAYING PROCEEDINGS PENDING ARBITRATION

The Court's tentative ruling is not contested. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff PD Restoration of East Bay, Inc.'s petition for an order staying proceedings pending arbitration is granted. No opposition filed. The Court signs a formal order.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Sean Kane, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Not Reported (302/HK)
